docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY RAY, LARKIN AS TO DEFENDANT ESFANDIARI, NEEMA ESFANDIARI, MEHRAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $75.00 SERVED MAR-12-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESFANDIARI, MEHRAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $75.00 SERVED MAR-12-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESFANDIARI, NEEMA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR A REGULAR JUDGE TO HEAR THE CASE TO MAY-08-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF: LARKIN RAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEEMA ESFANDIARI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2025 BY JUDGE: VICTOR M. HWANG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LARKIN RAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEEMA ESFANDIARI AND MEHRAN ESFANDIARI ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAY, LARKIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESFANDIARI, NEEMA ESFANDIARI, MEHRAN $5,879.38 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,879.38, MEDICAL BILLS + ONE WEEK LOST INCOME. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS INCOME OF $5000, BUT WAS ON REDUCED WORK FOR ONE WEEK = $2500. PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS. LEGA INTEREST AT 10% AFTER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESFANDIARI, NEEMA ESFANDIARI, MEHRAN
